untranslatable_reason: Pattern requires manual identification of ascending broadening formation geometry (highest high, horizontal trend line, and formation height calculation). The measure rule relies on detecting specific chart pattern structures that cannot be expressed with the available OHLCV and technical indicators. Conditions require: (1) identifying a horizontal support/resistance line within the formation, (2) computing the vertical distance between highest high and that line, (3) projecting target prices by adding/subtracting this height. These pattern recognition tasks require visual/structural analysis beyond point-in-time indicator values.
translation_notes: BULKOWSKI_DRY_0 is a pattern-based measure rule that depends on manual pattern detection. The entry/exit conditions above represent a generic breakout skeleton only and do NOT capture the specific formation geometry. Success rates vary significantly by market regime (bull up: 68%, bull down: 32%, bear up: 43%, bear down: 51%), suggesting context-dependent performance. To implement this rule, use a dedicated chart pattern detector or manual pattern identification before applying the height-based target calculation.
